name: 史泰西·克劳森
name_full: 史泰西·克劳森 Stacy Clausen
introduction: Stacy Clausen is an Australian actor from Melbourne, Victoria. His screen debut was in the fourth season of American supernatural adventure series, Preacher (2019). Since then, Stacy's television credits include ABC's 'Fires' (2021), ABC's 'Crazy Fun Park' (2023), Stan's 'Scrublands' (2024) and Binge's 'High Country' (2024-2026). He also appeared in Netflix's family adventure film 'True Spirit' (2023), Sony Picture/Netflix's shark thriller 'Thrash' (2026), as well as Netflix's war drama 'Mosquito Bowl' (2026). Stacy is set to appear in a leading role for Neon's queer horror romance 'Leviticus'. The film featured in the midnight section of the 2026 Sundance film festival.
